category_sources: Official mingw-w64 site says it provides headers, import libraries, libraries, and tools for building native Windows applications with GCC or LLVM.
source_facts.description calls it Minimalist GNU for Windows and GCC cross-compilers.
display_name_sources: Official website title and source_facts.name both use mingw-w64.
docs_sources: Official mingw-w64 website provides introduction, source code, and download/toolchain documentation.
repo_sources: Official mingw-w64 Source Code page says the main repository can be cloned from SourceForge at https://git.code.sf.net/p/mingw-w64/mingw-w64 and describes GitHub as a mirror.
tags_sources: Official mingw-w64 website describes Windows headers/libraries/tools for GCC or LLVM toolchains.
source_facts.executables list i686-w64-mingw32 and x86_64-w64-mingw32 compiler/binutils tools.
